title: Breathe on us, Lord of life
firstLine: Breathe on us, Lord of life,
publicDomainBasis: Edwin Hatch (1835–1889), Robert Jackson (1842–1914). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Breathe on us, Lord of life,
Fill us with life anew,
That we may love what Thou dost love,
And do what Thou wouldst do.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Breathe on us, Lord of life.
Until our hearts are pure,
Until with Thee we will one will,
To do or to endure.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Breathe on us, Lord of life,
Till we are wholly Thine,
Till all this earthly part of us
Glows with Thy fire divine.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Breathe on us, Lord of life,
So shall we never die,
But live with Thee the perfect life
Of Thine eternity.
